title: dendranthema myrianthum
intro: Dendranthema myrianthum, commonly known as Chrysanthemum or more specifically Dendranthema myrianthum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Asia and Eastern Europe. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dendranthema myrianthum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. Dendranthema myrianthum is often prepared as tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
